mapper.sql: f.is_deleted = 0 AND f.finish_status = 2 AND COALESCE(f.is_spare, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(f.roll_no_status, 1) != 3 AND (f.stock_in_time IS NULL OR f.stock_in_time >= #{q.dateFrom}) AND (f.stock_in_time IS NULL OR f.stock_in_time < DATE_ADD(#{q.dateTo}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)) AND o.customer_uuid = #{q.customerUuid} AND f.paper_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.paperName}, '%')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) totalDocuments, SUM(s.settle_status = 1) pendingDocuments, SUM(s.settle_status = 2) partialDocuments, SUM(s.settle_status IN (1, 2) AND s.unreceived_amount > 0 AND s.due_date < CURRENT_DATE()) overdueDocuments, COALESCE(SUM(s.total_amount), 0) totalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(s.received_amount), 0) receivedAmount, COALESCE(SUM(s.unreceived_amount), 0) unreceivedAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN s.settle_status IN (1, 2) AND s.unreceived_amount > 0 AND s.due_date < CURRENT_DATE() THEN s.unreceived_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) overdueAmount FROM biz_settle_order s WHERE

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(s.settle_date, '%Y-%m') dimensionKey, DATE_FORMAT(s.settle_date, '%Y-%m') dimensionName, COUNT(*) documentCount, COALESCE(SUM(s.total_amount), 0) totalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(s.received_amount), 0) receivedAmount, COALESCE(SUM(s.unreceived_amount), 0) unreceivedAmount FROM biz_settle_order s WHERE GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(s.settle_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY dimensionKey

SELECT s.customer_uuid dimensionKey, MAX(s.customer_name) dimensionName, COUNT(*) documentCount, COALESCE(SUM(s.total_amount), 0) totalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(s.received_amount), 0) receivedAmount, COALESCE(SUM(s.unreceived_amount), 0) unreceivedAmount FROM biz_settle_order s WHERE GROUP BY s.customer_uuid ORDER BY unreceivedAmount DESC, totalAmount DESC, dimensionName LIMIT 20

SELECT COUNT(*) recordCount, SUM(r.cash_amount > 0) cashRecordCount, SUM(r.scrap_offset_amount > 0) scrapRecordCount, SUM(r.discount_amount > 0) discountRecordCount, COALESCE(SUM(r.receive_amount), 0) settledAmount, COALESCE(SUM(r.cash_amount), 0) cashAmount, COALESCE(SUM(r.scrap_offset_amount), 0) scrapOffsetAmount, COALESCE(SUM(r.discount_amount), 0) discountAmount, COALESCE(SUM(r.scrap_weight), 0) scrapWeight FROM biz_receive_record r JOIN biz_settle_order s ON s.uuid = r.settle_uuid WHERE

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(r.receive_date, '%Y-%m') dimensionKey, DATE_FORMAT(r.receive_date, '%Y-%m') dimensionName, COUNT(*) recordCount, COALESCE(SUM(r.receive_amount), 0) settledAmount, COALESCE(SUM(r.cash_amount), 0) cashAmount, COALESCE(SUM(r.scrap_offset_amount + r.discount_amount), 0) nonCashAmount, COALESCE(SUM(r.scrap_weight), 0) scrapWeight FROM biz_receive_record r JOIN biz_settle_order s ON s.uuid = r.settle_uuid WHERE GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(r.receive_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY dimensionKey

SELECT s.customer_uuid dimensionKey, MAX(s.customer_name) dimensionName, COUNT(*) recordCount, COALESCE(SUM(r.receive_amount), 0) settledAmount, COALESCE(SUM(r.cash_amount), 0) cashAmount, COALESCE(SUM(r.scrap_offset_amount + r.discount_amount), 0) nonCashAmount, COALESCE(SUM(r.scrap_weight), 0) scrapWeight FROM biz_receive_record r JOIN biz_settle_order s ON s.uuid = r.settle_uuid WHERE GROUP BY s.customer_uuid ORDER BY settledAmount DESC, dimensionName LIMIT 20

SELECT COUNT(*) rollCount, SUM(lockRow.finish_uuid IS NULL) availableRollCount, SUM(lockRow.finish_uuid IS NOT NULL) lockedRollCount, SUM(f.warehouse_uuid IS NULL OR f.stock_in_time IS NULL OR f.is_abnormal = 1) exceptionRollCount, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(f.remaining_weight, f.actual_weight, f.estimate_weight, 0)), 0) totalWeight, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN lockRow.finish_uuid IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(f.remaining_weight, f.actual_weight, f.estimate_weight, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) lockedWeight FROM biz_finish_roll f JOIN biz_process_order o ON o.uuid = f.order_uuid AND o.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN biz_delivery_detail lockRow ON lockRow.finish_uuid = f.uuid AND lockRow.is_deleted = 0 AND lockRow.stock_lock_status = 1 WHERE

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(f.stock_in_time, '%Y-%m') dimensionKey, DATE_FORMAT(f.stock_in_time, '%Y-%m') dimensionName, COUNT(*) rollCount, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(f.remaining_weight, f.actual_weight, f.estimate_weight, 0)), 0) totalWeight, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN lockRow.finish_uuid IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(f.remaining_weight, f.actual_weight, f.estimate_weight, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) lockedWeight FROM biz_finish_roll f JOIN biz_process_order o ON o.uuid = f.order_uuid AND o.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN biz_delivery_detail lockRow ON lockRow.finish_uuid = f.uuid AND lockRow.is_deleted = 0 AND lockRow.stock_lock_status = 1 WHERE AND f.stock_in_time IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(f.stock_in_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY dimensionKey

SELECT COALESCE(f.warehouse_uuid, 'UNASSIGNED') dimensionKey, COALESCE(MAX(w.warehouse_name), '未分配仓库') dimensionName, COUNT(*) rollCount, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(f.remaining_weight, f.actual_weight, f.estimate_weight, 0)), 0) totalWeight, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN lockRow.finish_uuid IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(f.remaining_weight, f.actual_weight, f.estimate_weight, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) lockedWeight FROM biz_finish_roll f JOIN biz_process_order o ON o.uuid = f.order_uuid AND o.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_warehouse w ON w.uuid = f.warehouse_uuid AND w.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN biz_delivery_detail lockRow ON lockRow.finish_uuid = f.uuid AND lockRow.is_deleted = 0 AND lockRow.stock_lock_status = 1 WHERE GROUP BY f.warehouse_uuid ORDER BY totalWeight DESC, dimensionName
mapper.sql: SELECT dd.delivery_uuid, COUNT(*) rollCount, SUM(COALESCE(dd.out_weight, 0)) outWeight FROM biz_delivery_detail dd WHERE dd.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY dd.delivery_uuid
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) documentCount, SUM(d.delivery_status = 1) pendingDocuments, SUM(d.delivery_status = 2) completedDocuments, COALESCE(SUM(totals.rollCount), 0) rollCount, COALESCE(SUM(totals.outWeight), 0) totalWeight, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN d.delivery_status = 1 THEN totals.outWeight ELSE 0 END), 0) pendingWeight, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN d.delivery_status = 2 THEN totals.outWeight ELSE 0 END), 0) completedWeight FROM biz_delivery_order d LEFT JOIN () totals ON totals.delivery_uuid = d.uuid WHERE

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d.delivery_date, '%Y-%m') dimensionKey, DATE_FORMAT(d.delivery_date, '%Y-%m') dimensionName, COUNT(*) documentCount, COALESCE(SUM(totals.rollCount), 0) rollCount, COALESCE(SUM(totals.outWeight), 0) totalWeight, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN d.delivery_status = 2 THEN totals.outWeight ELSE 0 END), 0) completedWeight FROM biz_delivery_order d LEFT JOIN () totals ON totals.delivery_uuid = d.uuid WHERE GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(d.delivery_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY dimensionKey

SELECT COALESCE(d.warehouse_uuid, 'UNASSIGNED') dimensionKey, COALESCE(MAX(d.warehouse_name), '未分配仓库') dimensionName, COUNT(*) documentCount, COALESCE(SUM(totals.rollCount), 0) rollCount, COALESCE(SUM(totals.outWeight), 0) totalWeight, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN d.delivery_status = 2 THEN totals.outWeight ELSE 0 END), 0) completedWeight FROM biz_delivery_order d LEFT JOIN () totals ON totals.delivery_uuid = d.uuid WHERE GROUP BY d.warehouse_uuid ORDER BY totalWeight DESC, dimensionName
